title: Dichorisandra reginae
taxonomy: Dichorisandra reginae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It belongs to the genus Dichorisandra, which contains several species of plants. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Dichorisandra reginae is an herbaceous perennial, and its classification also includes the kingdom Plantae. More specifically, it is classified as a monocotyledonous plant, which is a type of flowering plant.
